feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Project Creation Error in ADT
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am getting this weird error : You were successfully authenticated, but an error occurred during fetching the Service Instance's SAP System ID.

As i refered atleast 10 different blogs and solutions but still not able to resolve this issue

Simply, I have created abap enviroinment and try to create abap cloud project in ADT , But ending up getting this error.

I have tried booster and manually created abap enviroinment , its of no use

Need your solution ...

Screenshots : 

ABAP Cloud SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: How to hide a result list column in a value help?
entry.content:
In BTP ABAP environment, I am making a value help based on a CDS entity.

The @UI.selectionField: [] annotation works fine, and the filters are rendered in the proper order.

The @UI.LineItem: [ { position: # } ] also works fine where it is maintained, in that the search results are displayed in the correct order.

However, the fields that do not have @UI.LineItem annotation maintained are still displayed in the result list.  They are added to the result list at the end, after all the other fields with a @UI.LineItem annotation. I have tried to maintain @UI.LineItem: [ { hidden: true } ] to these fields, but they are still displayed.

These fields are required in the CDS view entity (they are selection fields) and must not be displayed in the result list. How do I prevent these unwanted result list fields from being displayed?

entry.title: FIRST_DAY_IN_PERIOD_GET fm giving 13 months in a fiscal year instead of 12.
entry.content:
Iam using this fm to get data of a fiscal year. If i enter posting period as 8 ie, November and Year as 2023. it should get data from 1st Dec 2022  to 30th Nov 2023 ie, 12 months. Instead of this it is fetching data from 1st Nov 2022 to 30th Nov 2023 ie, 13 months. kindly help. below is the code. it is giving e_date = 1st Nov 2022 , instead of 1st Dec 2022.
* Get Billing Date
*   Posting Date YYYY
    DATA lv_gjahr TYPE bdatj.

*   Posting Period
    DATA lv_poper TYPE poper.

    lv_gjahr = im_gjahr - 1. " Previous Year of Input

*   Date of First Day determined for Period and Fiscal Year
    CALL FUNCTION 'FIRST_DAY_IN_PERIOD_GET'
      EXPORTING
        i_gjahr        = lv_gjahr
        i_periv        = 'V3' " April - March, 4 Special Periods
        i_poper        = lv_poper
      IMPORTING
        e_date         = gv_ysd
      EXCEPTIONS
        input_false    = 1
        t009_notfound  = 2
        t009b_notfound = 3
        OTHERS         = 4.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                 WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.

    IF im_poper > 2.
      lv_poper = im_poper - 2. " Last 2 Months of Input Period

    ELSE.
      lv_poper = im_poper.
    ENDIF.
    lv_gjahr = im_gjahr.

*   Date of First Day determined for Period and Fiscal Year
    CALL FUNCTION 'FIRST_DAY_IN_PERIOD_GET'
      EXPORTING
        i_gjahr        = lv_gjahr
        i_periv        = 'V3' " April - March, 4 Special Periods
        i_poper        = lv_poper
      IMPORTING
        e_date         = gv_qsd
      EXCEPTIONS
        input_false    = 1
        t009_notfound  = 2
        t009b_notfound = 3
        OTHERS         = 4.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.

entry.title: create inline a filter table with new abap syntax
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I have a table productions containing, among others, article ids. Now I want to loop over all entries for which no Article ID exists in the articleIs table. Can I do this inline with the new abap syntax. 

Something like this

 

LOOP AT filter #( productions IN articles where ArticleId not in articles-ArticleId ) INTO DATA(production).

 

Does anyone know if this is possible.

Thanks and regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Error "OData Server return 401 - Unauthorized error" / Browser is not configured to using SPNego
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Could you please help/support on the below error. Recently we have been facing an issue when accessing the SAP Hybrid App in IPAD, After the successful authentication when the call goes to gateway system we are getting this error. More details on the error 

Error "Retrieve metadata failed - OData Server return 401 - Unauthorized error" /

Your Browser is not configured to using SPNego

The connections is via SAP BTP and we are seeing the same error logs in cloud platform. But I am not able to see any logs in gateways system.

Kindly let me know or help me to fix this issue. This is very urgent

entry.title: How to Pass multiple fields(Non Key) in Odata query(URI)
entry.content:
Hi Odata Experts,

How can i pass multiple parameters (non-key fields along with a key field) in a Odata query(URI) in the Gateway WITHOUT defining underlying get_entitySET( ) method?

The requirment is that these non-key fields along with Key field are important to fetch data from underlying FM.

 

Thanks,

Ricky

entry.title: Change Transport Layer for a Package in BTP
entry.content:
Hello,

We have assigned incorrect transport layer to a package and would like to know if there is a way we can edit the package and change the transport layer in BTP.

Currently we are not able to edit this field.

My workaround was to create a new package with correct transport layer and move all the objects into it but it wouldn't allow it . Its not even allowing me to delete the object from the package. I get the below error. 

Appreciate your suggestions

entry.title: Change values in debugging for variables without a Pen Icon
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I want to change the value of a variable in debugging mode. I know we can change values when there is a Pen icon on right side of the Variable. But, I need to know how to change values of those variables that are without these Pen Symbol. Is it possible to change them in debugging mode ?

Below is the screenshot for reference. Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Pricing Calculation Issues with BAPI_RFC_CALCULATE_PRICES
entry.content:
We've encountered some challenges with the BAPI_RFC_CALCULATE_PRICES function module, and I'd like to bring your attention to two specific error messages we've been encountering:

Message :

  • Message Class: WV
  • No: 186
  • Description: Calculation schema &1 of appl. &2 is not capable of price calculation.

If anyone has encountered these errors before or has suggestions on how to address them, please feel free to share your thoughts and experiences in this thread. Your contributions are highly valued and could significantly aid us in resolving this issue promptly.

We are mainly focusing on the Message 2, which encounters when try to post bulk pricing.

entry.title: A Waring message is displayed when creating an error message in RAP
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I had to create a save_modified method in my Service and there creating an error message.

APPEND VALUE #( %tky = VALUE #( %is_draft  = if_abap_behv=>mk-on        
                                HeaderUuid = lv_header_uuid )           
                %msg = new_message( id         = lx_runtime->id             
                                    number     = lx_runtime->number         
                                    severity   = lx_runtime->severity_error )
) TO reported-header.

The UI displays a warning message with the option to cancel or save the dataset.

I would expect an error message and no option to save the dataset.

Does anybody knows how to achieve this?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: How to show value help with values for Application Job parameters - BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have created Application Job Catalog Entries & Application Job Templates with two Selection parameters. I want to have this parameters a value help values so users can select from popup. In the Job Catalog entry, I have defined Value help exit class with Implemented interface IF_APJ_RT_VALUE_HELP_EXIT. How can I populate the value help values for these two parameters ?

I didn't find any blog/documentation related to this.

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/application-jobs-2?locale=zh-CNstate%3DPRODUCTION

@FrankJentsch  @Andre_Fischer  - Could you please help me here ? The Value help exit is available in the Job Catalog entries but when I populate some values in the class it doesn't visible in the F4 Help dialog

 

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: How to create a custom outbound IDOC and send data to the same server and to different client.
entry.content:
The requirement to create custom Outbound IDoc :

Sales Order Data: VBAK - Header Table and VBAP - Item Table - 5 fields from each table and create the segment as Header and Item.

So whenever I hit run to the program idoc should trigger and send it to the client. How should I approach this problem?

I have created the segments correctly also I have created the program but whenever I hit the program it shows the current status of 29.

Can you guys provide me step-by-step guidance so that I can rectify my errors if there is missing in the process, then I go further with that.

entry.title: Unable to get ABAP in eclipse
entry.content:
Hi all

In my company laptop I have installed the eclipse.I followed the steps exactly for installation. 

After completion of installation we have to restart and we have to select ABAP tool something no. I haven't done that part. 

Now I'm unable to do that. If I go further I'm getting error as you can cannot creat a view.

I'm unable to give my sap userid I'm not getting that option .

I have deleted my eclipse multiple times but after selecting the install new software it directly taking me to the page.

But I'm unable to do anything related to ABAP.

Please help me to solve this.

Regards,

Raji

entry.title: Use of elements not permitted in CDS view Data Definition. HANA on-prem.
entry.content:
We have an SAP HANA 2022 FPS02 Fully Activated on-prem system. I am using eclipse with ADT version 3.40.0.

When trying to create a data definition for a CDS view I receive the following errors for the fields and table respectively:

The use of element vbeln of Table VBAK is not permitted.
The use of Table vbak is not permitted.

The same error occurs no matter which tables or elements I try. 

The same error occurs if I define the sqlview name in the data definition.

Could this be a SAP system setting or issue with eclipse or the ADT?

entry.title: Development Objects are not permitted in ABAP Environment(BTP) | Excel Upload and Processing of Data
entry.content:
Use case:
I use the RAP model to build an app on the BTP in which I can upload an Excel file. The upload saves the Excel in hexadecimal format in a table.
The aim is now to convert the data into a "readable" form. Then the data should be saved in an internal table for further processing in the backend.

I can already manage the conversion on the on-premise system. Below you will find the coding of how I get from the raw string (hexadecimal format of Excel) to my internal table.

 

 

    TYPES : BEGIN OF gty_uploadFile,
              col1 TYPE String,
              col2 TYPE String,
              col3 TYPE String,
            END OF gty_uploadFile.

    TYPES gty_uploadFile_tt TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF gty_uploadFile.

    TYPES : BEGIN OF gty_uploadFileStructured,
              col1 TYPE vkorg,
              col2 TYPE matnr,
              col3 TYPE char250,
            END OF gty_uploadFileStructured.
    TYPES gty_uploadFileStructured_tt TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF gty_uploadfilestructured.

    DATA gt_uploadFileStructured TYPE gty_uploadFileStructured_tt.


SELECT SINGLE FROM table_excel
    FIELDS attachment
    WHERE document_id = 1
    INTO (iv_exceldata). "hexadecimal format of excel

   DATA(lt_binary_data) = CL_BCS_CONVERT=>XSTRING_TO_SOLIX(
    EXPORTING
        iv_xstring = iv_exceldata
		).

    DATA(go_spreadsheet) = NEW cl_fdt_xl_spreadsheet(
         document_name = CONV #( 'testname' )
         xdocument     = cl_bcs_convert=>solix_to_xstring( it_solix = lt_binary_data ) 
	       ).

    go_spreadsheet->if_fdt_doc_spreadsheet~get_worksheet_names(
      IMPORTING worksheet_names = DATA(gt_worksheetNames) 
      ).

    IF lines( gt_worksheetNames ) > 0.
      DATA(go_worksheet_itab) = go_spreadsheet->if_fdt_doc_spreadsheet~get_itab_from_worksheet(
                                    worksheet_name = gt_worksheetNames[ 1 ] ).

      FIELD-SYMBOLS <gt_worksheet> TYPE gty_uploadFile_tt.
      ASSIGN go_worksheet_itab->* TO <gt_worksheet>.

      LOOP AT <gt_worksheet> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<gs_worksheet_line>).
        IF sy-tabix = 1.
          CONTINUE.
        ENDIF.

        APPEND VALUE gty_uploadfilestructured( 
           col1 = <gs_worksheet_line>-col1
           col2 = |{ <gs_worksheet_line>-col2 ALPHA = IN }|
           col3 = <gs_worksheet_line>-col3 ) 
        TO gt_uploadFileStructured.
         
       ENDLOOP.

     out->write( gt_uploadfilestructured ).
      
    ENDIF.

 


But now to my problem. I cannot use some of the objects on the BTP because I get the following error messages:
- The use of Class CL_BCS_CONVERT is not permitted.
- The use of Class CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET is not permitted.
- The use of Interface IF_FDT_DOC_SPREADSHEET is not permitted.

I can see why this is the case and that these classes are not suitable for the cloud. However, after extensive research, I could not find an alternative that works on the cloud.

So my question is: Is there an alternative for these classes and the interface that works for the BTP?

I look forward to your support!

Best regards,
Fabio

entry.title: Is it possible to integrate Oracle ERP with SAP CPI from that SAP Commerce?
entry.content:
We are using the Oracle ERP as backend system and SAP Commerce as E-Commerce platform. Can we use CPI as middle layer to exchange the data from SAP Commerce to Oracle ERP?

If it is possible could you please point me the documentation to do so.

Thank you

entry.title: How to overcome an HTTP error 421 occured: SSL handshake error with the abapGIT plugin in Steampunk
entry.content:
When trying to add a new repository from GitHub.com I ran into the problem that the following error message was shown:

HTTP error 421 occured: SSL handshake with github.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED (-102)

The error is due to the new SSL root certificate that is used on github.com since March the 7th.

entry.title: Does SPL screen contact logic?
entry.content:
I couldn't find the information.

We have set the contact linked with the BP, does the screen logic same as customer/vendor?

Thanks.

entry.title: How can I send payload as an attachment through ANS Email Alert?
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently we are ANS for exception email alerts, so we have a requirement to send payload as an attachment via ANS email alert with the body what we are currently sending. Can I send attachment ANS? Any suggestions

Thanks in Advance.

Thanks & Regards

Venkat

entry.title: How to call a Odata web service created in BTP trial in CI-DS?
entry.content:
I have created a Odata web service in BTP trial and I was able to test it successfully in Postman using Oath2 token. But when, I try to test the API in CI-DS using the Oath2 token with the Odata adapter, I am getting an error. I tried both Odata V4 and Odata V2 and both doesn't work. But, I was able to test the sample northwind Odata service successfully.

Since it is a trial system, I cannot setup communication systems. Can you confirm the error is because of no communications arrangements between BTP and CI-DS?

Thanks,

Siva
